File reading tool "set_session_ready" may output sensitive file contents without filtering
Tool "send_input_to_session" references user without specifying scope boundaries. LLM will attempt to access the broadest possible scope.
Tool "list_repl_sessions" references user without specifying scope boundaries. LLM will attempt to access the broadest possible scope.
Tool "list_repl_configurations" references config without specifying scope boundaries. LLM will attempt to access the broadest possible scope.
Tool "mark_session_failed" uses vague action words (use) without specific operations. LLMs will interpret this as the broadest possible action.
Tools "list_repl_sessions" and "get_session_details" have 67% description overlap. LLM may choose between them unpredictably.
